programme.title: E103
programme.desc: Stay in the know with what's happening this morning. ABC News brings you up-to-the-minute news to fuel your daily conversations so you can stay connected and follow the discussion across the day. Presented by Gemma Veness.

programme.title: E103
programme.desc: The leading news at lunchtime. Kathryn Robinson brings you today's top stories and the latest news as it unfolds, with reporters in the community across Australia and around the world reporting on the issues that matter.

programme.title: E2 - Disinformation Versus Democracy
programme.desc: Disinformation campaigns prove shockingly innovative in this investigation of digital deception on the international stage - from Paris to the Philippines. We see how, when truth is under attack, democracy is weakened.

programme.title: E8 - Reuben Kaye, Daniel Riley
programme.desc: Namila checks out what's on at Heide; Reuben Kaye talks cabaret, community and catharsis; we talk to Daniel Riley, Australian Dance Theatre's first Indigenous Artistic Director; and meet Malian musician Viex Farka Toure.

programme.title: E2 - Disinformation Versus Democracy
programme.desc: Disinformation campaigns prove shockingly innovative in this investigation of digital deception on the international stage - from Paris to the Philippines. We see how, when truth is under attack, democracy is weakened.

programme.title: E103
programme.desc: End your day with the latest on the day's top stories. ABC News has reporters across Australia and around the globe to uncover what's happening and why it matters. Presented by Michael Tetlow in Perth.

programme.title: E2 - Disinformation Versus Democracy
programme.desc: Disinformation campaigns prove shockingly innovative in this investigation of digital deception on the international stage - from Paris to the Philippines. We see how, when truth is under attack, democracy is weakened.

programme.title: E10 - The Riesling Trail
programme.desc: Susie heads to South Australia's renowned wine region, walking the contours of a disused railway track from Auburn to Clare, while hearing stories of women's survival and tasting wine from the valley's first viticulturalists.

programme.title: E104
programme.desc: Joe O'Brien brings you a comprehensive summary of the day's events, with the latest breaking news, in depth coverage of the top stories, live crosses, interviews and explainers to bring you up to speed on what's going on.

programme.title: E34 - Benjamin Law
programme.desc: Writer Benjamin Law brings in his all-time favourite, ginger for a dessert, then Alice introduces Benjamin to the joys of a rissole.

programme.desc: Sarah Ferguson presents Australia's premier daily current affairs program, delivering agenda-setting public affairs journalism and interviews that hold the powerful to account. Plus political analysis from Jacob Greber.

programme.title: E207 - Rise of the Night Ninja
programme.desc: When Leo accidentally saves a subway station full of innocent people, he's inspired to take on a life of crime-fighting vigilantism as the Night Ninja! But has he met his match with the villainous La Fleur and her gang of dognappers?

programme.title: E101 - Cactus Sitting / Disaster of Hole 2
programme.desc: The twins take a cactus called Pricklebutt to the beach and end up mounting a dramatic search and rescue mission. // Best and Bester won't let Grumpy Pants' round of golf stop them from catching the finale of their favourite show.

programme.title: E125 - Which Witch is Which? / Get Off My Lawnie
programme.desc: Bunny's mother visits from the old country. // Granny Tentacles gets her own spin-off show.

programme.title: E706 - Road Trip: Bringing Down the House
programme.desc: During a visit of the White House, the Loud kids can't help but sneak off and explore the rooms not on the tour.

programme.title: E410 - De-Pat-ment Store
programme.desc: Patrick fails his way up the corporate ladder at Upturn's mall.

programme.title: E1003 - Spy Dames / Cupid's Harrow
programme.desc: During Grandparent's Day at Lincoln's school, he and Myrtle face off with a spy nemesis from Myrtle's past. // Leni accidentally causes trouble for Lori and Bobby while taking calls on her and Miguel's dating podcast.

programme.title: E204 - Jack's Day Off
programme.desc: Chuck moves in with the Wylde-Paks after Lil & Jack accidentally destroy his house. They must hide his awful roommate habits from their parents.

programme.title: E228 - Fun-Sized Friends / Grandmum's the Word
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick exchange tiny living versions of themselves. It's a whole hunk of homunculus fun! // Plankton tells his Grandma that he owns the Krusty Krab, but must keep the lie going when she comes to visit.

programme.title: E422 - A Star is Scorned / Senior Moment
programme.desc: Lori regrets everything she hasn't done in high school, and vows to make up for lost time in her senior year. // When Lola realizes that double the cuteness could help her break into show business, she teams up with Lily.

programme.title: E113 - From Dust Till Dawn
programme.desc: Chloe is struggling with her leadership skills, but when a villain attacks her school field trip, Max and Phoebe have to put Chloe in charge while they try to take down the villain and defuse his dangerous astronomical weapon.

programme.title: E1003 - Spy Dames / Cupid's Harrow
programme.desc: During Grandparent's Day at Lincoln's school, he and Myrtle face off with a spy nemesis from Myrtle's past. // Leni accidentally causes trouble for Lori and Bobby while taking calls on her and Miguel's dating podcast.

programme.title: E1003 - Spy Dames / Cupid's Harrow
programme.desc: During Grandparent's Day at Lincoln's school, he and Myrtle face off with a spy nemesis from Myrtle's past. // Leni accidentally causes trouble for Lori and Bobby while taking calls on her and Miguel's dating podcast.

programme.title: E809 - Wild Goss Chase
programme.desc: Privy to all the gossip at school, Lola is recruited to write her own gossip column in the school newspaper.

programme.title: E226 - iTake on Dingo
programme.desc: The Dingo channel has apparently been stealing ideas from iCarly, so Carly, Sam, Freddie, and Spencer go to the Dingo studio to give the writers a piece of their mind.

programme.title: E209 - The Itching Scratch
programme.desc: Leo suits up as the Night Ninja one last time to take on the villainous cat named Scratch and his mutant Vampire Fleas. It's a grudge-match fifteen years in the making! But what does it all have to do with Splinter? The final battle begins!

programme.title: E179 - Extreme Sports / Squirrel Record
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick try to join the extreme sports team The Drasticals. // Sandy finds a book of world’s records, and tries to break them all with SpongeBob’s help.

programme.title: E903 - Meet the Purrents / Apartment Complex
programme.desc: When Lori and Bobby find a kitten, they decide to coparent and swap the kitten back and forth between their homes. // After telling her family how great her apartment is, Lori unknowingly entices her sisters to secretly take over her space.

programme.title: E112 - Follow the Sprinkles / Canyon Valley V. Dirk
programme.desc: When Lily starts digging to find out why her favorite ice cream truck is selling shaved ice, she uncovers a town-wide conspiracy. // Dirk is wrongfully accused of stealing a Canyon Valley landmark so Min comes out of lawyer retirement to help him.

programme.title: E423 - Wheel and Deal / Feast or Family
programme.desc: Lana wants to win a race car ride-along with her hero, so she and Lincoln enter to compete in a soap box derby. // When Luan must enroll in a culinary class, Dad uses it to share his passion for cooking with one of his kids.

programme.title: E424 - A Dark & Story Night / Sand Hassles
programme.desc: When the lights go out in the Loud House, the kids entertain themselves by taking turns telling parts of a story. // Lucy and the Morticians' Club try to thwart plans for a school field trip to the beach.

programme.title: E120 - Little Patscals
programme.desc: Patrick learns what GrandPat's childhood was like.

programme.title: E903 - Meet the Purrents / Apartment Complex
programme.desc: When Lori and Bobby find a kitten, they decide to coparent and swap the kitten back and forth between their homes. // After telling her family how great her apartment is, Lori unknowingly entices her sisters to secretly take over her space.

programme.title: Towel
programme.desc: Why throw the old towels away? Upcycling and reusing are Hepi and Briko's favourite thing to do

programme.title: Short Circuits

programme.title: Lab Results
programme.desc: Trapped underground with the neurotic Bruno and with no cell phone reception, the gang must combine their scientific knowledge to save themselves or be lost forever.

programme.title: Popsicles
programme.desc: Telmo makes this great recipe and Tula helps him with it, including the eating part at the end.

programme.title: King Penguin
programme.desc: Annabelle, the king penguin, is displaying some worrying symptoms. She's waving her head about skywards and Jorge is concerned she may have some neurological problems. Will Annabelle rejoin her friends on the great, icy mound at Loro Parque ever again?

programme.title: The Elephant Yam Trap
programme.desc: The elephant yam attracts beetles with its smell. Then it traps them and covers them in pollen before sending them off to bring the pollen to other yams.

programme.title: The Metric System
programme.desc: The Metric System is a universal way to measure length, weight, volume, time, electricity and temperature. It is used widely today in countries all over the world, and is also the standard in the science community and is crucial to global industry. But how does it work?

programme.title: All Gamers Day
programme.desc: The Gaming Show gang decide to create their own video game-themed holiday called All Gamers Day.

programme.title: Sickness Strikes
programme.desc: Liam is feeling very sick. Can he hold it down long enough to impress the coach with his shooting skills? Ice dancer Ella reveals just how much skating means to her. And disaster strikes for captain Emily when she falls on an already injured shoulder.

programme.title: A Day in the Life of Ester
programme.desc: As head of the aquarium, Ester sets a pace that's hard to keep up with - especially on her Segway! And when a normal day includes alligators, zebra sharks, jellyfish and shark pods, you may need a Segway to keep up with this Spanish dynamo too!

programme.title: Anysberg - Hidden Gem Of The Klein Karoo
programme.desc: The team visits Anysberg, an island mountain in the Karoo Desert. They find a cave with mysterious rock art that provides a glimpse into the past, and they discover how Nature can recover when given a chance.

programme.title: The Metric System

programme.title: Savdhaan India -Naya Adhyay
programme.desc: The host provides an in-depth analysis of some of the most shocking real-life crime stories in India and sheds light on how the victims fought back for justice.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE delivers the latest from Japan, Asia, and the rest of the world. While covering wide network of correspondents breaking news and developing stories, offering a perspective from this corner of the globe, a team of trusted anchors ties it all together to give you a picture of what's happening now, and what's ahead.

E6 - Creative Belgitude: A Series Of Talents!
programme.desc: Head for Adventure Valley in Durbuy, transformed for the occasion into a realm of fear. Also Eric-Emmanuel Schmitt, writer and playwright, opens the doors of his chateau in the heart of Hainaut; the Gimber drink; Patrick Syen and his Bentleys; and the Pluriel restaurant.

programme.title: E8 - Skate/Grillz/Beaubleu Watches
programme.desc: Since Paris Design Week 2024, skateboarding has been the future of design - and that's a pretty fun thought! Just like this latest craze, grillz for jewelled smiles. Beaubleu watches shows French seconds and skirts are now worn over trousers.

programme.title: E6 - Creative Belgitude: A Series Of Talents!
programme.desc: Head for Adventure Valley in Durbuy, transformed for the occasion into a realm of fear. Also Eric-Emmanuel Schmitt, writer and playwright, opens the doors of his chateau in the heart of Hainaut; the Gimber drink; Patrick Syen and his Bentleys; and the Pluriel restaurant.

programme.title: E4 - Peeling Of The Bells/In Search Of A Dream
programme.desc: Bell-ringing remains an ancestral art firmly rooted in Valais. Three bell-ringers introduce us to their passion. Then we head to the Kaeserberg railway museum near Fribourg, to discover a miniature piece of Switzerland.

programme.title: E4 - Peeling Of The Bells/In Search Of A Dream
programme.desc: Bell-ringing remains an ancestral art firmly rooted in Valais. Three bell-ringers introduce us to their passion. Then we head to the Kaeserberg railway museum near Fribourg, to discover a miniature piece of Switzerland.

programme.title: E20 - Painters Of Barbizon/Guy Martin/Chloe/Stephanie Trolez
programme.desc: On the outskirts of Fontainebleau, the Musee des Peintres de Barbizon traces the history of Impressionism. A self-taught chef turned Michelin-starred chef, Guy Martin looks back on his gastronomic career at the Grand Vefour. Time travel with Chemena Kamali, at the helm of Chloe. The art of straw marquetry with Stephanie Trolez.

programme.title: E8 - Skate/Grillz
programme.desc: Since Paris Design Week 2024, ''skate'' has been shaping the future of design: a rather joyful idea! Just like this latest craze, grillz, for bejeweled smiles.

programme.title: E4 - Peeling Of The Bells/In Search Of A Dream
programme.desc: Bell-ringing remains an ancestral art firmly rooted in Valais. Three bell-ringers introduce us to their passion. Then we head to the Kaeserberg railway museum near Fribourg, to discover a miniature piece of Switzerland.

programme.title: E4 - Peeling Of The Bells/In Search Of A Dream
programme.desc: Bell-ringing remains an ancestral art firmly rooted in Valais. Three bell-ringers introduce us to their passion. Then we head to the Kaeserberg railway museum near Fribourg, to discover a miniature piece of Switzerland.

programme.title: E4 - Peeling Of The Bells/In Search Of A Dream
programme.desc: Bell-ringing remains an ancestral art firmly rooted in Valais. Three bell-ringers introduce us to their passion. Then we head to the Kaeserberg railway museum near Fribourg, to discover a miniature piece of Switzerland.

programme.title: E4 - Peeling Of The Bells/In Search Of A Dream
programme.desc: Bell-ringing remains an ancestral art firmly rooted in Valais. Three bell-ringers introduce us to their passion. Then we head to the Kaeserberg railway museum near Fribourg, to discover a miniature piece of Switzerland.

programme.title: E5 - The Spirit Of The Letter/Dna In The Waterworks
programme.desc: The art of calligraphy has found a devoted defender in Jean-Sebastien. This monk from Fribourg harmoniously blends prayer, artistic creation and contemplative immersion in the silence of Einsiedeln Abbey. Tristan Favre, a young plumber, prepares to take over the family business from his mother Nicole Wolff, Geneva's first woman plumber.

programme.title: E5 - The Spirit Of The Letter/Dna In The Waterworks
programme.desc: The art of calligraphy has found a devoted defender in Jean-Sebastien. This monk from Fribourg harmoniously blends prayer, artistic creation and contemplative immersion in the silence of Einsiedeln Abbey. Tristan Favre, a young plumber, prepares to take over the family business from his mother Nicole Wolff, Geneva's first woman plumber.

programme.title: E5 - The Spirit Of The Letter/Dna In The Waterworks
programme.desc: The art of calligraphy has found a devoted defender in Jean-Sebastien. This monk from Fribourg harmoniously blends prayer, artistic creation and contemplative immersion in the silence of Einsiedeln Abbey. Tristan Favre, a young plumber, prepares to take over the family business from his mother Nicole Wolff, Geneva's first woman plumber.

programme.title: E20 - Painters Of Barbizon/Guy Martin/Chloe/Stephanie Trolez
programme.desc: On the outskirts of Fontainebleau, the Musee des Peintres de Barbizon traces the history of Impressionism. A self-taught chef turned Michelin-starred chef, Guy Martin looks back on his gastronomic career at the Grand Vefour. Time travel with Chemena Kamali, at the helm of Chloe. The art of straw marquetry with Stephanie Trolez.

programme.title: E8 - Skate/Grillz/Beaubleu Watches
programme.desc: Since Paris Design Week 2024, skateboarding has been the future of design - and that's a pretty fun thought! Just like this latest craze, grillz for jewelled smiles. Beaubleu watches shows French seconds and skirts are now worn over trousers.

programme.title: E6 - Creative Belgitude: A Series Of Talents!
programme.desc: Head for Adventure Valley in Durbuy, transformed for the occasion into a realm of fear. Also Eric-Emmanuel Schmitt, writer and playwright, opens the doors of his chateau in the heart of Hainaut; the Gimber drink; Patrick Syen and his Bentleys; and the Pluriel restaurant.

programme.title: E6 - Careful, There's Humans Up There!
programme.desc: Follow the southern team as they test new migration tech and tools that could reduce shark attacks in a popular snorkelling spot. Then catch and tag bull sharks with the northern team, who want to help local swimmers steer clear of birthing mothers.

programme.title: E2 - Under Pressure
programme.desc: As food and water become scarce, Crystal, the fierce leader of the Ruins gang, sets her sights on rival Kati’s territory and its neighboring fruit trees. Watch as Crystal’s move and a raid by outside invaders lead to dire consequences for one troop.

programme.title: E5 - Ireland
programme.desc: Explore an island surrounded by the mighty Atlantic ocean, subjected to pounding waves and driving rain. From the Cliffs of Moher to the Giant’s Causeway, this land has been shaped and reshaped by the power of water and violent geological forces.

programme.title: The Sushi Hype - Lifestyle Trend With A Dark Side
programme.desc: Sushi: Once an expensive gourmet food, now a global fast-food phenomenon. Whether you get it from an Asian snack bar or a supermarket to-go box, sushi is trendy. It's low in calories, healthy, and affordable. But sushi consumption also brings problems.

programme.title: On Tram Tracks Through WrocŁAw - A City In Transition
programme.desc: The best way to appreciate Wrocław is from tram line No. 1. It has been rolling through the city for 140 years - passing rubble, after the war, and past renovated facades, modern apartment blocks and the grassy banks of the River Oder, today.

programme.title: E41
programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Each carries her own struggles, yet together they support one another as they race to protect the wounded and vulnerable, often standing up against powerful forces. Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.

programme.desc: Looking into topical information ranging from social issues to entertainment news through the eyes of the general public.

programme.desc: An easy-to-do exercise program for everyone from children to the elderly.

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: Set at a convenience store in Mojiko, Kitakyushu, this story follows an unlikely pair: a strikingly handsome manager and a wild, enigmatic man who seems able to handle anything. Together, they take on impossible problems, unfolding a tale filled with humor, mystery, and heartfelt human drama.

programme.desc: A song program where children can sing along by reading the lyrics on the screen.

programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。

programme.title: E34
programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.title: E37
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.desc: All the African news from the TV5MONDE news staff.

programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (8 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.desc: International relations analysed using geography maps, which are vital to understanding the world in which we live and the challenges it presents.

programme.title: Slam:2026
programme.desc: Three contestants compete on arrow-word grids that they try to fill in by finding the answers to the given clues. But to access the clues, they must first answer questions with a very particular characteristic: the answer is always a letter.

programme.title: E11 - Farewell Disgusting Dinner
programme.desc: Four best friends have a secret: after school, they climb up to their hidden tree house. It contains a priceless treasure: books! Each day, the children tell one another stories, travelling to exciting fairy-tale worlds.

programme.title: E23
programme.desc: In each episode, an animal from the African continent is highlighted in song.

programme.title: Tendance XXI S12
programme.desc: French creativity is booming in the fields of fashion, crafts, design, beauty and gastronomy. 'Tendance XXI' showcases a know-how that evolves in tune with the times, sometimes even anticipating them.

programme.title: E225
programme.desc: MY HONG KONG STORY: Each episode of My Hong Kong Story features a Hong Kong native, or those who surround their tale here. Interviewees convey their indigenized story in a personnel aspect. With a 15-minute essence per episode, the cinematic language brings a new perspective to observe Hong Kong for Chinese-speaking audience around the world. Everyone can have an indepth understanding of Hong Kong and its people.

programme.title: Premium Spectacular: The Gaze of the Double-Headed Eagle – Putin's East-West Game
programme.desc: Born into humble circumstances, he was once a secret weapon of the Soviet KGB; during his 26 years in the Kremlin, he held the fate of the double-headed eagle in his hands; he once looked to the West, only to return disappointed; between East and West, he repeatedly searched for his place. On his second visit to China, how will Putin rewrite Russia and his era?

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: 丁當在訂婚前夕與初戀陳阿明重逢，卻不料對方竟改名餘坤並擁有了新身份，為治癒陳阿明因實驗失敗導致的人格分裂，丁當與友人暗中佈局，以糖衣計劃引導他直面過去的傷痛，從撕裂的情感與記憶中脫困。

programme.title: E57
programme.desc: 專為資深單身人士定制的相親交友節目，每集有4位男嘉賓和3位女嘉賓，依序進行一對一交流。未上場嘉賓則分別在男女嘉賓室觀察場上溝通情況，加深對有意對象的瞭解。節目主張為愛回歸，愛情不分年齡，緣來從來不晚。

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: 丁當在訂婚前夕與初戀陳阿明重逢，卻不料對方竟改名餘坤並擁有了新身份，為治癒陳阿明因實驗失敗導致的人格分裂，丁當與友人暗中佈局，以糖衣計劃引導他直面過去的傷痛，從撕裂的情感與記憶中脫困。

programme.title: Happy End
programme.desc: Bora Choi, who works at an English language institute, is having an affair with her ex-lover, Il-Beom Kim. Her husband, Min-ki Seo, is a former banker. He has lost his job, and has taken over the domestic roles of the house: cooking, cleaning, and watching the baby. In his free time, he watches soap operas and reads romance novels. Min-ki is aware of the affair, but seems willing to put up with it and to continue living with his cheating wife. Bora is disturbed when Il-Beom seems to want to take their affair further and pushes past her boundaries, risking to expose their relationship.

programme.title: Grand Maison Paris
programme.desc: After their restaurant 'Grand Maison Tokyo' earned a Michelin three-star, Natsuki Obana and Rinko Hayami venture to Paris to open 'Grand Maison Paris,' aiming to become the first Asian chefs to achieve the same honor. However, they face cultural challenges and intense pressure in a city filled with culinary masters. Following a mishap at a gala dinner, Obana makes a pact with his former mentor: he will leave France if they don't earn three stars in the next Michelin evaluation. Can Obana and his team overcome these obstacles to achieve their dream?

programme.title: Baogu Produces -The Sound Supreme Trio of Ne Zha 2
programme.desc: Fish Liew, Jennifer Yu and Peter Chan Charm Man, have been invited to voice over Cantonese version of the animation film “Ne Zha 2”. This episode features these three actors sharing the joys and challenges of the dubbing process. While Fish tells that Cantonese has been a big challenge for her, Jennifer surprisingly wants to gigantify herself when asked which character's magic she would like to acquire and Peter also praises Fish even more! Let's find more fascinating behind-the-scenes stories they are going to share one by one......

programme.title: OMG! Mom's Big News
programme.desc: Rita, 53, and her husband Siu Hung were planning their retirement when they suddenly discovered that they were pregnant! Both the couple wanted to have the child removed, but they didn't know how to tell each other. Until at a family dinner, two children accidentally discovered the secret of their mother, and the reaction was uproar. At the same time, Siu Hung's sister-Fuk Ling returned from abroad and decided to move in with everyone. The incompatible relationship between sister-in-law and sister-in-law suddenly plunged the Lee family into a chaotic dispute. In anger, Rita decided to become a senior mother and decided to give birth to the child in her belly. The peaceful and well-off family began an unprecedented 'big reform'. However, during this wonderful pregnancy process, everyone began to become different because of this sudden little life...including Fuk Ling, who had been married for many years but did not want to have children; his otaku son who was not good at expre

programme.title: When Sun Meets Moon
programme.desc: In 1992, a heavy rainstorm caused massive power outage in Hong Kong. At that night, two young astrology enthusiasts, Moon and Sun, met under the starry night by the seaside. When their affection to each other grew, Sun was admitted into a boarding school and would move to another country in a few months under his father's plan. Like the sun and moon, the couple could hardly see each other despite that they were living in the same city, but their love endured amidst the separation and opposition from Moon's mother. Overcoming the challenges from teachers, friends and family, time has come for Sun to depart...

programme.title: Are You Lonesome Tonight?
programme.desc: On a dark night, Xueming hits a pedestrian with his car and flees the scene. Desperate to escape his feelings of guilt, he decides to approach the dead man's wife, Mrs Liang. Meanwhile, the body is discovered - riddled with bullets. Chen, the detective in charge of the investigation, becomes obsessed with the case. Years later, all three remain caught in a tangled web of memories and lies, desperately searching for a truth that refuses to be revealed...

programme.title: Baogu Produces -Deconstructing the Cold War Universe
programme.desc: Director Longman Leung is here to shed light on the mysteries of the “Cold War” series. What actually does the operation codename “Cold War” mean? Longman reveals that not a single shot had been fired in the first script while the foreshadowing in dialogue of 'Cold War' and 'Cold War 2' are going to be revealed in the sequel! Let's find out more behind-the-scenes stories of the “Cold War” series shared by Longman.

programme.title: E1 - A Mustang's Twists And Turns
programme.desc: A good client brings in a problematic 1965 Mustang expecting Noah and his crew to transform this twisted shell of a car and into a beast at the track.

programme.title: E11 - Mo Mollusks, Mo Problems
programme.desc: Eric visits Northern California to hunt for abalone, a rare and valuable sea snail.

programme.title: E11 - Prop, Drop & Ball
programme.desc: Join the unconventional Tweto family as they continue to transport life's necessities to one of the most remote and extreme regions of America.

programme.desc: When one client brings in a perfectly running, near flawless Porsche, and the other a brand new Cadillac CTS-V, the only thing left to do is everything!

programme.desc: A nature-loving architect plans to build a one-of-a-kind modern cabin deep in the California Redwoods that will rival the jaw-dropping views of nearby Big Sur!

programme.desc: A car designer believes his custom-built concept car is worth $250,000. Addison reviews a drag-racing 1967 Chevelle.

programme.title: E2 - 9-1-1 On A 911
programme.desc: When one client brings in a perfectly running, near flawless Porsche, and the other a brand new Cadillac CTS-V, the only thing left to do is everything!

programme.title: E414 - Pups Save The Runaway Kitties / Pups Save Tiny Marshall
programme.desc: The Kit-trastrophe crew get into the poufy shampoo and blow away. // Marshall dreams he gets shrunk.

programme.title: E212 - Tongue Twisted Troll / Chompy And The Cloud Flower
programme.desc: Dora and Boots help Grumpy Old Troll untwist his tongue with Quickatoo's help. // Dora and Boots help Chompy find another Cloud Flower Seed after he accidentally eats Isa's.

programme.title: E121 - Greedyguts / Where Is Bali?
programme.desc: A goat has escaped from the mountain and is coming to wreak havoc, devouring everything in its path! // Bali is nowhere to be found, and the Barbapapa deploy all their imagination to look for her. They have no idea that a nice surprise awaits them!

programme.title: E406 - Slushy Storm / Cowboy Steel
programme.desc: Baron Bite creates a slushy ice cloud that brings the blizzard to Platinum City! // A game of wild west gets out of control when Cowboy Steel's Robo Pony and special suit gets wet!

programme.title: E115 - The Ant Hill / Redbeard The Elf Pirate
programme.desc: Things start to go missing all over the kingdom, and Ben & Holly realise that ants are stealing their possessions. // Barnaby Elf's uncle Redbeard has lost all his treasure, prompting Holly & Ben to follow the clues in an effort to track it down.

programme.title: E711 - Pups Save The Skydivers / Pups Save The Cupcakes
programme.desc: Mayor Goodway and Farmer Al are ready for a day filled with Skydiving fun, but their adventure is quickly derailed. It's Paw Patrol to the rescue! // Alex and the Mini Patrol get locked inside the flounder, the Paw Patrol dives in to save the day!

programme.title: E111 - The Grass Is Always Greener... / When I Grow Up
programme.desc: Barbabright coats the house in magic product to prevent water leakage. The next day, The house deflates like a balloon. // A bird builds its nest on Barbazoo's belly. Barbazoo wants to become a big tree to shelter animals. This becomes complicated.

programme.title: E406 - Slushy Storm / Cowboy Steel
programme.desc: Baron Bite creates a slushy ice cloud that brings the blizzard to Platinum City! // A game of wild west gets out of control when Cowboy Steel's Robo Pony and special suit gets wet!

programme.title: E625 - The Olden Days
programme.desc: Mummy Pig shows Peppa and her friend Suzy Sheep old photographs from when they were babies. Peppa and Suzy don't remember being that young but are pleased to see that they've always been best friends.

programme.title: E701 - Castle
programme.desc: Mummy and Daddy Pig take Peppa and George on a visit to a castle!

programme.title: E115 - The Ant Hill / Redbeard The Elf Pirate
programme.desc: Things start to go missing all over the kingdom, and Ben & Holly realise that ants are stealing their possessions. // Barnaby Elf's uncle Redbeard has lost all his treasure, prompting Holly & Ben to follow the clues in an effort to track it down.

programme.title: E104 - Boots
programme.desc: Tim tries out some new rocket boots which soon fly out of control.

programme.title: E203 - Summer Camp I / Summer Camp II
programme.desc: Barbapapa and Barbamama have announced to their dear barbababies that they are going on a trip to Easter Island. // The Barbababies, the twins, and Mr. Strict set sail on 'Thesee', a magnificent sailboat.

programme.title: E119 - The Crew Builds A Giant Lemonade Stand / The Crew Builds A Wildlife Bridge
programme.desc: After the Crew builds a special lemonade stand for Lucas and Lily, a sour Speed Meister sends it rolling through Builder Cove! // Why does Crunchy the beaver cross the road? Because Rubble & Crew build a bridge to help him get to the other side!

programme.title: E503 - Basketball
programme.desc: Daddy teaches the kids how to play basketball, and it is not long before they are good enough to take on a team.

programme.title: E614 - The Tiger Treasure
programme.desc: Blaze, AJ, and Stripes put their explorer skills to the test as they follow the trail to the fabled Tiger Treasure

programme.title: E112 - The Crew Does A Home Renovation / The Crew Builds A Lighthouse
programme.desc: The pups are starstruck when their favorite TV renovation star, Hank Hammer, comes to see them at work. // Cap'n Turbot is bringing Mayor Greatway a big surprise. But when a thick fog rolls in, the pups have to build a lighthouse fast!

programme.title: E102 - Present
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy and Tia can't decide on the best gift for Grandma.

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: 日本國稅局「米」課，是令逃稅者聞風喪膽的最終防線。在其內部，新設了一個原創部門——複雜國稅案件處理室「雜國室」。由米田正子（松嶋菜菜子 飾）領軍，集結一群身懷絕技的怪才，專門制裁最棘手難纏的惡德逃稅者，成為體系內獨特而強悍的制裁之刃。

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: 只有最頂層的0.1%人口可住在天空城堡——一個獨特的住宅社區。在上流社會的「SKY Castle」中更住著一群欲扶助丈夫事業和培育子女成為二代貴族的貴婦。然而，這些貴婦都有一個秘密不能告訴任何人。她們的財富、榮譽和最重要的權力鬥爭從現在開始！

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: 講述世界排名第一的拳擊選手李權淑在令全韓國為之瘋狂後突然引退並銷聲匿跡；某一天體育經理人的出現並提出了一個讓她無法拒絕的復出提議，而隨之發生的故事。

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: 講述世界排名第一的拳擊選手李權淑在令全韓國為之瘋狂後突然引退並銷聲匿跡；某一天體育經理人的出現並提出了一個讓她無法拒絕的復出提議，而隨之發生的故事。

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: 無論過去、現在、未來，每個別具意義的相遇都造就華麗的日子，且無論什麼人都曾經擁有過華麗的日子。事業、愛情兩得意的能力者李志赫遇上責任感強陽光開朗的咖啡廳經理兼室內設計師池恩悟。兩人儘管外表看似光鮮亮麗，但在經歷人生的低潮後仍守在對方身邊，克服各種試驗，找到人生的真諦。

programme.title: E17
programme.desc: 當紅主播許妍（趙露思飾）和都會精英沈皓明（陳偉霆飾）是一對人人艷羨慕的夫妻，看似十分般配的兩人，由於出生環境的差異，始終難以融入對方的圈子。許妍靠著光鮮的主持人身分和「精心裝點」的身世順利和沈皓明步入婚姻，而這一切盡在沈皓明的掌握下。衝突來臨，許妍脫離沈皓明的掌控一去不回頭。沈皓明卻發現自己早已陷入愛情，想要全力追回許妍。經歷種種，兩人終於撕掉外表的偽裝，重新靠近，會見彼此的內在，也重新認識自己。

programme.desc: 當紅主播許妍（趙露思飾）和都會精英沈皓明（陳偉霆飾）是一對人人艷羨慕的夫妻，看似十分般配的兩人，由於出生環境的差異，始終難以融入對方的圈子。許妍靠著光鮮的主持人身分和「精心裝點」的身世順利和沈皓明步入婚姻，而這一切盡在沈皓明的掌握下。衝突來臨，許妍脫離沈皓明的掌控一去不回頭。沈皓明卻發現自己早已陷入愛情，想要全力追回許妍。經歷種種，兩人終於撕掉外表的偽裝，重新靠近，會見彼此的內在，也重新認識自己。

programme.title: E26
programme.desc: To Dan-dan, her family was an obstacle. She eventually leaves home and starts working as a resident tutor. And the more time she spends with the kids and their father, Young-guk, the more she falls for him.

programme.title: E326
programme.desc: Two-day road trip to the beautiful spots in all the corners of Korea! Instead of fancy studio, this on-the-road reality show takes place in the rural sides. While over 10 million Koreans travel abroad each year, the '2 Days and 1 Night' casts travel around Korea - to the mountains, farms, fishing villages, islands - where you can meet the welcoming smiles of our neighbors and the beautiful nature that cleanse our eyes.

programme.title: E1293
programme.desc: The best tunes in Korea! the most sensational music show on TV satisfies all your senses! Fantastic performances and Awe-inspiring harmony by the nation's top musicians! Follow the latest trend in the Korean music scene through the K-chart, a summary of the week's hottest songs.

programme.title: E51
programme.desc: A meticulous and intense revenge chronicle in which two women return under false identities to uncover the truths and sins hidden within the Adel family.

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: The thoroughly city-bred Seong Taehun family suddenly finds themselves in the pristine yet unpredictable village of Yeonri-ri. Determined to return to Seoul, they face hilarious challenges, cultural clashes, and heartwarming moments. This family “reboot” drama captures their misadventures, resilience, and the unexpected bonds they form along the way.

programme.title: E26
programme.desc: In Onjeong Market, located in Onjeong, a town some distance away from Seoul, the area is buzzing with change as apartment complexes are built and plans for subway extensions and new town developments are announced. Across a single street stand a principled general hospital, Gongmyeongjeongdae Clinic, and traditional Korean clinic, Yangji Barun Clinic. The two families who run these places have been bitter enemies for years, bound by a long standing grudge from an incident in the past. Even the smallest matters turn into big fights, making them the most famous rival families in Onjeong. This is a family growth drama about these two families as they unravel their long held misunderstandings, heal their wounds, learn to love one another, and are reborn as one family.

programme.desc: The thoroughly city-bred Seong Taehun family suddenly finds themselves in the pristine yet unpredictable village of Yeonri-ri. programme.title: E2 - Cody Is a Good Brother & a Good Friend
programme.desc: Join Cody as he learns how to be a good brother & a good friend! In a heartwarming moment, Cody finds out he's going to be a big brother. After some initial nerves, he spends a special day with his mama & her baby bump. Then, the big day arrives as the family brings his new sister, Kendi, home! Watch Cody take on his new role, helping Kendi get to sleep & learning to play new games together like bouncing a balloon.

programme.title: E3 - Learning, Growing & Having Fun!
programme.desc: Buster is learning, growing & having fun! First, he gets covered in mud & needs to get clean, but he's frightened by the big, noisy carwash! He has to work up the courage to try it himself. Then, after eating too many sweets, Buster gets a sore tooth & Amber the Ambulance teaches him the importance of keeping his teeth clean. In a race against Terry Tractor, Buster also learns that slow & steady can sometimes win the race!

programme.title: E2 - Underwater Learning Adventures!
programme.desc: Dive into some underwater learning adventures with The Sharksons! First, join the sea friends as they swim through the alphabet to learn their ABCs. Then, explore the vibrant hues of Splashy Reef with a journey to learn all the shades of a beautiful rainbow. The learning continues with important daily routines! Sing along with Tucker the Turtle as he takes a bath & watch as Baby Grub eagerly learns the importance of dental care by brushing her big, sharp shark teeth!

programme.title: E3 - A Sick Trick, A Spider, A Bump & A Fly!
programme.desc: The Minibods are dealing with a sick trick, a spider, a bump & a fly! First, Jeff is sick, but after he recovers, he misses the attention & pretends he's still unwell! Then, Fuse is woken up by spooky noises in the night & must put on a brave face for Lulu to investigate. His bravery is tested again when he finds a spider in his gym & doesn't know how to get it out. The chaos ends when Pogo can't sleep & has to deal with a very noisy fly!

programme.title: E3 - Baby John's Fun Animal Playtime!
programme.desc: Get ready for some fun animal playtime with Baby John! He & Manny are playing with their animal toys & a bus. With the help of their imagination, they travel into a fantastic animal world where their toys become real! Then, Baby John has fun in his play pretend veterinary clinic, treating his dog Bingo as one of his patients. The animal fun continues as the family tries to give a very stinky Bingo a bath!

programme.title: E2 - Healthy Habits & Happy You!
programme.desc: It's time to learn some healthy habits to keep you happy! First, Grandma Mei makes sure everyone washes their hands with lots of bubbles before eating some yummy dumplings. Then, when Baby Izzy doesn't want to eat her vegetables, Mei uses a bit of magic to make the veggies come to life to sing & dance! The healthy habits continue as the friends learn how to recycle trash to help save the planet & Ella learns to get right back up after getting a boo boo.

programme.title: E2 - Underwater Learning Adventures!
programme.desc: Dive into some underwater learning adventures with The Sharksons! First, join the sea friends as they swim through the alphabet to learn their ABCs. Then, explore the vibrant hues of Splashy Reef with a journey to learn all the shades of a beautiful rainbow. The learning continues with important daily routines! Sing along with Tucker the Turtle as he takes a bath & watch as Baby Grub eagerly learns the importance of dental care by brushing her big, sharp shark teeth!

programme.title: Razor
programme.desc: CGTN's brand new science and technology show, covering cutting edge developments from all over the world. RAZOR will show you the world's most powerful laser and the world's smallest anti-cancer treatment. It will take you from the weird world of quantum computing to the boundaries of the cosmos. An international team of reporters will follow the guidance of Occam's Razor - the principle that the simplest explanation is the best one. RAZOR will show that we are already ''living in the future'!

programme.title: The Vibe
programme.desc: The Vibe is a 30-minute TV show that runs daily on weekdays on CGTN. The content focuses on exciting new trends, fashion, and cultural topics across a range of disciplines both in China and abroad. The host presents various culture-related topics in a fun way while also doing some in-depth analysis to give viewers a fuller picture as to what is happening, and why it matters.

programme.desc: From drug kingpins and serial killers to pirates, assassins, and murderous con men, these are the criminals whose bloody legacies earn them a spot among 'History's Deadliest'.

programme.desc: Two visionaries breathe new life into the hotel industry in America and the world by setting the modern standard for hospitality. Despite setbacks, these rivals will stop at nothing to be number one.

programme.title: Chhaava

programme.title: Chhichhore
programme.desc: Divided by time, united by a tragic incident. In a bittersweet reunion, seven middle-aged friends take a walk down the memory lane at the least expected place. Release Year: 2019 Director: Nitesh Tiwari Awards: 2020 Nominee Screen Award - Best Film Critics, 2020 Nominee Filmfare Award -Best Film, 2019 Winner Nickelodeon Kids' Choice Award - Favorite Movie, 2020 Winner Regional Award - Best Feature Film in Hindi, 2020 Nominee Popular Award - Best Story,

programme.title: Total Siyapaa
programme.desc: Aman, a Pakistani man living in London, falls in love with Asha, an Indian woman. But he must convince her parents to let them get married, despite their different nationalities. Release Year: 2014 Director: Eeshwar Nivas Awards: 2005 Winner Special Award - Ramesh Sippy - Best film in the last 50 years of Indian cinema.

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: When Dick Cabela founded “Cabela’s”, he was unaware that it was to become the foremost outfitting store in the world. So it is fitting that his son is on a quest to explore the Hard Truths of conservation. Join Dan Cabela on this high-impact journey of discovery as he uncovers some of lesser known facts in the conservation world. In particular, the role that hunting and the utilization of wildlife can play as a modern day conservation tool.

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: When Dick Cabela founded “Cabela’s”, he was unaware that it was to become the foremost outfitting store in the world. programme.title: E6 - Highlight 6
programme.desc: This week a heavy rescue like no other – as father and son Dave and Adam Crouch team up to save a lorry transporting a train from sinking into soft ground. Crouch Recovery Op Jim must rescue a lorry from a ditch after the driver attempted an ill-advised three-point turn. And while Rory moves an antique fire engine for the boss, Fluff must get rid of a lorry load of stinking cheese…

programme.title: E1 - Black Bear & Wild Rice
programme.desc: Daniel takes on the profound challenge of a bear hunt with fellow hunter and houndsman Sam. He also explores traditional methods for harvesting delicious wild rice with Arthur, Avani and Sara.

programme.title: E1 - Murchison GeoRegion
programme.desc: Western Australia’s Murchison GeoRegion is well known for its’ ancient landscapes and brilliant skies, this is the real outback. We take a journey through a region full of stories dating back to the earth’s beginning, around 4½ billion years ago.

programme.title: E1 - Lionfish
programme.desc: The white sand beaches and emerald green waters of Destin, Florida are the setting for the 'World's Luckiest Fishing Villages.' Beneath the water's surface, it's a different story...one of the most formidable species, the lionfish, has been wreaking havoc on the local ecosystem for decades. The ecological advantage of the lionfish is its venomous spikes, used to corner prey and protect itself from predators, and giving it an advantage over native fish. Luckily, local conservationists and fishing captains discovered years ago that lionfish are as tasty as they are dangerous. Yia joins local biologist Alex Fogg as he works to mitigate the lionfish's damage by harvesting them one buttery, flaky bite at a time.

The ecological advantage of the lionfish is its venomous spikes, used to corner prey and protect itself from predators, and giving it an advantage over native fish. Luckily, local conservationists and fishing captains discovered years ago that lionfish are as tasty as they are dangerous. Yia joins local biologist Alex Fogg as he works to mitigate the lionfish's damage by harvesting them one buttery, flaky bite at a time.

programme.title: E6 - Highlight 6
programme.desc: This week a heavy rescue like no other – as father and son Dave and Adam Crouch team up to save a lorry transporting a train from sinking into soft ground. Crouch Recovery Op Jim must rescue a lorry from a ditch after the driver attempted an ill-advised three-point turn. And while Rory moves an antique fire engine for the boss, Fluff must get rid of a lorry load of stinking cheese…

programme.title: E1 - Lionfish
programme.desc: The white sand beaches and emerald green waters of Destin, Florida are the setting for the 'World's Luckiest Fishing Villages.' Beneath the water's surface, it's a different story...one of the most formidable species, the lionfish, has been wreaking havoc on the local ecosystem for decades. The ecological advantage of the lionfish is its venomous spikes, used to corner prey and protect itself from predators, and giving it an advantage over native fish. Luckily, local conservationists and fishing captains discovered years ago that lionfish are as tasty as they are dangerous. Yia joins local biologist Alex Fogg as he works to mitigate the lionfish's damage by harvesting them one buttery, flaky bite at a time.

programme.title: E1 - Black Bear & Wild Rice
programme.desc: Daniel takes on the profound challenge of a bear hunt with fellow hunter and houndsman Sam. He also explores traditional methods for harvesting delicious wild rice with Arthur, Avani and Sara.

programme.title: The Inspector Wears Skirts
programme.desc: Police Superintendent Wu is in charged with the duty of organizing Hong Kong's first all women police action squad. At first, her style of training is too harsh for the girls who are used to dates and dances. She is able to gain their respect and obedience eventually. The leader of the men's squad, Kan, falls for Wu and he has the most hilarious way of showing his love towards her. Wu's top shooter and fighter help her give the girls some fine tuning such as walking on fire. Their first real assignment finally arrives when they, along with the men's squad, are sent to guard a jewelry exhibition. The robbers capture both Wu and Kan in a shoot-out...

programme.title: Tiger Cage III
programme.desc: James and John are working in the Commercial Crime Bureau. Jointly they look into a case of which the suspect is an influential rich business man called Lee. James has a girl friend called Suki who is working for Wong, Lee's accountant. One night, in a party holding by Lee, John hears by chance the internal tips on a stock that Lee and his staff are talking about. John thus takes out all his saving and buys that stock. In the meantime, since Wong is murdered and James is also assaulted and seriously burnt, the case is closed under great pressure. On the other hand, the price of the stock which John has invested heavily slides. John is thus deeply depressed. Six months later, James has been much recovered under the care of two old men. At this time, Suki has climbed up to be a senior and important person in Wong's firm. Even Lee becomes a blocking stone in her eyes...
